Contact Us

Portrait sessions with editorial direction

A calm, guided experience built around flattering light and easy prompts — images that feel cinematic, clean, and unmistakably you.

  • Best for: founders, creatives, couples
  • Includes: wardrobe notes + location guidance
  • Deliverables: curated gallery + print-ready files
  • Tone: bright, warm, editorial polish
Explore sessions

Weddings & engagements — refined, documentary coverage

Quiet confidence on a fast day. We capture honest moments and elevated portraits — with timelines that protect the experience.

  • Best for: city weddings, destinations, intimate weekends
  • Includes: timeline support + family shot flow
  • Coverage: ceremony → reception story
  • Finish: true-to-life skin tones, warm highlights
Plan wedding coverage

Events & celebrations — energy, detail, and story

Coverage that feels cinematic and effortless. We capture the room, the people, and the small details that make the night yours.

  • Best for: galas, birthdays, private dinners
  • Includes: venue walkthrough + shot priorities
  • Delivery: highlight set + full story gallery
  • Lighting: flash when needed, never harsh
Explore event coverage

Brand photography — cohesive sets, clear direction

Launch-ready images built for web, press, and paid. We plan for consistency across scenes so your brand looks intentional everywhere.

  • Best for: founders, teams, campaigns
  • Includes: creative direction + shot list
  • Delivery: hero set + flexible crops
  • Style: warm editorial with clean whites
Build a campaign set

Product & detail photography — crisp, tactile, premium

Elevated still life and product detail images with studio-level polish — built for ecommerce, lookbooks, and modern ad creative.

  • Best for: ecommerce, packaging, tabletop
  • Includes: styling guidance + lighting plan
  • Delivery: hero frames + variants
  • Finish: clean whites, warm highlights, sharp detail
See product coverage

Lifestyle & family sessions — natural, bright, home-ready

Simple prompts, beautiful light, and space for real connection — photographed with warmth and a refined, print-first finish.

  • Best for: families, couples, milestones
  • Includes: timing + location guidance
  • Delivery: curated gallery + print options
  • Pacing: calm, candid, connected moments
Plan a lifestyle session

A small studio built for calm direction

We work with minimal gear on set and maximal attention to light, pacing, and comfort — so the images feel effortless and elevated.

  • NYC-based, available for travel
  • Editorial warmth with clean, bright whites
  • Guided from planning to delivery
  • Print-first files + social crops
Meet the studio

A process that protects the vibe

We plan around light, movement, and story — then keep the session day simple. Direction is gentle and specific, so you never feel “posed.”

  • Creative direction + shot flow
  • Location + timing recommendations
  • Editing that stays true to skin tones
  • Gallery curation with print in mind
How we work

Clear, warm, intentional — from inquiry to delivery

Expect clear communication, timeline-friendly pacing, and an easy gallery experience. We help you choose favorites and prep images for print and web.

  • Prep call + wardrobe notes
  • Candid moments + hero portraits
  • Sharing links + print-ready downloads
  • Optional album and wall art guidance
What to expect

Planning notes, styling guides, and print-first advice

Save these for later. Each resource is designed to make your session day feel calm and your images feel consistent across web and print.

Work Contact Us

Who we are

A calm studio with a cinematic eye.

MNY Photo is built for clients who want warmth, clarity, and images that feel honest — while still looking like a feature.

Start an inquiry View work

Our story

We started with a simple promise: make people feel comfortable, then craft images that live beyond a trend.

The studio is intentionally small — so communication is direct, timelines are respected, and every gallery gets real attention. We photograph with warmth and precision, and edit with an eye for consistency across an entire story.

Values

The guardrails that keep sessions calm — and galleries consistent.

Warmth over hype

Trends come and go. We aim for warmth, clarity, and images you’ll still love years from now.

Direction that feels natural

We lead with simple prompts and pacing so you never feel stuck or overly “posed.”

Print-first craft

Color, skin tone, and contrast matter. Our edits are made to hold up in print and across campaigns.

Clear communication

The best sessions feel easy. We keep expectations and timelines straightforward from the first email.

Our approach

We start with your goals and your audience, then build a shot flow that fits your time and energy. Light comes first — and everything else follows.

Client experience

Expect a guided, low-pressure session with direct feedback. You’ll never wonder what to do with your hands.

Editing philosophy

Consistent, warm, and true to your skin. We chase clean tones and a cinematic softness that doesn’t look filtered.

Let’s plan something calm and beautiful.

Tell us what you’re planning — we’ll recommend the right coverage and a light-first timeline.

Contact Us View Work

MNY Photo

Premium, bright editorial photography — made to be printed, shared, and remembered.
